scope: Only permissions, features, and actions supported by Agrisense Middleware REST APIs and WebSocket. RBAC is client-side; middleware has no role enforcement.

rest: arrivals: create, list, get by id
transfers: initiate, cancel, complete; list, get by id
collections: record; list, get by id
losses: record (transfer / storage); list, get by id
spoilages: record; list, get by id
middlewareCapabilities.realtime: WebSocket: arrival, transfer, spoilage, loss, collection events

cultivator.description: Post-harvest and farmer workflows: crop management, storage tracking, consignment visibility, basic inventory view.
exampleActions: View own arrivals, transfers, collections, losses, spoilages
Record arrival; initiate / cancel / complete transfer
Record collection, spoilage, transfer loss, storage loss
Receive WebSocket alerts for arrivals, transfers, spoilage, loss, collection
cultivator.notes: Billing, support tiers, rate limits are out of scope for middleware. AI recommendations are client-side.

read_only.description: View-only access for auditors or reviewers; no create/update/delete.
exampleActions: View arrivals, transfers, collections, losses, spoilages, inventory, crops, customers
Optionally subscribe to WebSocket for read-only real-time updates
read_only.notes: Read-only is enforced client-side; middleware does not restrict to GET.

customer.description: Optional limited-access role. Token includes customer_ids; WebSocket can filter by customer_id. REST APIs are not yet customer-scoped.
features: Data Viewing (customer-scoped when middleware supports it)
exampleActions: View own consignments/batches when client applies customer-based filtering
customer.notes: Optional. Keep only if client will use customer_ids or middleware adds customer-scoped APIs.

rolesDropped.operator: Device control, maintenance logs. Real-time monitoring overlaps cultivator.
rolesDropped.manager: Team management, financial views, predictive reports, advanced reporting not in middleware.
rolesDropped.admin: User management, system configuration, API access, full system access not in middleware.

recommendation.rationale: Middleware supports only cultivator-style data and workflows plus view-only (client-enforced). Customer is optional until customer-scoped support exists.
